subject: This card fights the Trump agenda (get yours by midnight) >>

name: Cody
subject: Come Out for Breakfast on Us!
body:
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Peter,

You're invited to the first Rise and Shine Freedom Breakfast of 2017 on **Saturday, February 4th at 9am!** This month, Americans for Prosperity Policy Analyst David Barnes will be discussing how companies like Uber, Lyft, and Airbnb have drastically changed how people plan a vacation, order take out, or get around town.
Whether you're an avid Uber user or don't know what an Airbnb is, you won't want to miss the first Rise and Shine Freedom Breakfast. [RSVP today](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=97b59290730753f360ecd52b69f470d5ca69c6077439749cd616f5aca1a72592eb8dab9be83025e9 "RSVP today")!
[](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=97b59290730753f38c6de836704a5605a063d633827726a2868097c5e6ed5cba3d3f7d83887303fb)
**Rise and Shine Freedom Breakfast****"Does the Sharing Economy Help or Hurt?" featuring Policy Analyst David Barnes****Saturday, February 4th, 9-10:30am****AFP Sterling Office**[**6 Pidgeon Hill Dr., Ste 130** **Sterling, VA 20165**](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=97b59290730753f33b151c5f0f495d5b792f0a17647387bfe013d980b562b1c283977c6cf05f32d0 "6 Pidgeon Hill Dr., Ste 130Sterling, VA 20165")
The sharing economy is the next big battleground between freedom lovers and big government supporters, and it's important to get all the facts! So come out for food, fun, and information about what it all means for you. PLUS we'll be enjoying breakfast burritos from Anitas! [Sign up today so we can make sure to have enough food for everyone](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=97b59290730753f3e3888c495d9526f2e2e5640108c85622f7f57a18ab83fe7a978dbca55bac3aea "Sign up today so we can make sure to have enough food for everyone")!
Cody Holt Northern Virginia Field Director[cholt@afphq.org](mailto:cholt@afphq.org?subject=VA Breakfast Event "cholt@afphq.org")571-271-3178
**P.S. We'll be giving away a copy of Arthur Brooks' "The Conservative Heart" at the breakfast too!**

---
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
We respect your right to privacy - [view our policy](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=97b59290730753f3c810f5ff4475b7b0d28f2b466bcfa3f9fe897650050ffceae002320a450e43f7)
Americans For Prosperity 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201
[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU)

name: Liz Thomas
subject: I thought I'd won my battle, but...
body:
Help me defend the ACA **Read why the Affordable Care Act matters to Liz, and then say you're in to defend it:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Save-the-ACA1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170125_sup_sg3&source=em_20170125_sup_sg3")**
Fellow Democrat --

When I was 31 years-old, I was diagnosed with ovarian cancer. I was fortunate to be able to receive treatment -- and have been in remission for decades -- but I was told that I would remain uninsurable for the rest of my life. Even though I had conquered my cancer, I now had a pre-existing condition.

I thought I had fought my battle and won, but I soon realized that surviving my disease was only the first of many struggles. I faced lapses in coverage for years. I remember having a severe reaction to a medication and, without health insurance, had nowhere to turn. I survived only because of the generosity of a local doctor who treated me at no charge. Without his act of kindness, I would not be here today.

Nobody should have to rely on random acts of kindness to receive life-saving health care. Those of us with pre-existing conditions are the people who need access to quality health care the most, yet we are the ones who all too often are shut out of the system and left to fend for ourselves.

That is why I am so grateful for the Affordable Care Act. I have lived every day happier and healthier knowing that people like me can no longer be rejected by health insurance companies.

I'm sharing my story with you today in the hope that it will inspire you to get involved to help save the Affordable Care Act, and to remind you of how vital it is for millions of Americans like me. **Will you stand with me in fighting -- literally, for my life -- to save the Affordable Care Act and protect millions of American's access to affordable health care?**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Save-the-ACA1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170125_sup_sg3&source=em_20170125_sup_sg3")**
Thank you so much,

Liz Thomas
Pacific Grove, CA

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c70c/4067b0a/23b5994ea/7e788f2b/805872017/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170125_sup_sg3&source=em_20170125_sup_sg3"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c70c/4067b0a/23b5994ea/7e788f28/805872017/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170125_sup_sg3&source=em_20170125_sup_sg3"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c70c/4067b0a/23b5994ea/7e788f29/805872017/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170125_sup_sg3&source=em_20170125_sup_sg3") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c70c/4067b0a/23b5994ea/7e788f36/805872017/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170125_sup_sg3&source=em_20170125_sup_sg3"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

body:
President Trump is making a HUGE announcement today. |

Friend — did you see President Trump’s tweet last night? He knows and understands the need to secure our border, and he’s wasting no time in starting. But we both know that the Democrats will stop at nothing to try and stop President Trump’s agenda. Friend, add your name and show you support President Trump’s plan to finally secure our Southern border and build the wall. The American people have spoken, and President Trump is listening. Add your name, Friend, to show you stand with the President and agree that it’s finally time to secure our border! Thank you, TRUMP HQ
ADD MY NAME

name: Democrats.org
subject: Add your name to protect our voting rights:
body:
We need to protect the right to vote
---
**Add your name if you're ready to fight to protect the right to vote:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Voting-Rights1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170125_pw_sg3&source=em_20170125_pw_sg3")**
I'm doing my best not to react to every little thing Donald Trump tweets. But his tweets this morning -- announcing a "major investigation" into supposed voter fraud based on his absurd belief that he lost the popular vote because as many as 5 million people illegally voted in November -- are a real cause for alarm.

**[This is a call to action for all of us who believe in safeguarding our most fundamental right: the right to vote.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Voting-Rights1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+This+is+a+call+to+action+for+all+of+us+w&utm_campaign=em_20170125_pw_sg3&source=em_20170125_pw_sg3")**

Because if Trump were serious about this investigation, he'd just turn up what we already know -- real, in-person voter fraud is virtually non-existent. You're more likely to get struck by lightning than find someone who illegally cast a ballot.

**[But this isn't a legitimate investigation. It's a pretext for a major crackdown on voting rights.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Voting-Rights1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+But+this+isnt+a+legitimate+investigation&utm_campaign=em_20170125_pw_sg3&source=em_20170125_pw_sg3")**

In the years since the Supreme Court gutted the Voting Rights Act, as Republicans have won governorships and gained power in state legislatures, they've put in place restrictions that make it harder to vote -- eliminating same-day registration, strict voter ID laws, drastic cuts to voting hours and locations, and the like.

We already suspected that Trump was going to try and do the same thing on a national level. Immediately after Election Day, he was taking advice from Kansas Secretary of State Kris Kobach, the architect of several states' harsh voting restrictions. His choice of Attorney General, Jeff Sessions, has bought into Trump's illegal voting conspiracy and is a long-time opponent of the Voting Rights Act.

And now this. It's no coincidence that a week after John Lewis called Donald Trump illegitimate, after the lowest approval ratings for a newly-inaugurated president in recent memory, after millions marched around the world to protest his regressive agenda, Trump has resurrected unfounded claims of voter fraud as justification for suppressing the vote.

The right to vote is the most important right in our democracy -- it is how we defend all other rights and how we hold our elected officials accountable. And Donald Trump is coming for it.

**So we need to be more resolved than ever to defend our access to the ballot box. Democrats are ready to go to the mat to protect the right to vote. If you're with us, add your name right now:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Voting-Rights1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170125_pw_sg3&source=em_20170125_pw_sg3")** Thanks,

Pratt

Pratt Wiley
Director of Voter Expansion
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c703/4067b0a/23b66aebc/7e7b792e/2667187652/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170125_pw_sg3&source=em_20170125_pw_sg3"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c703/4067b0a/23b66aebc/7e7b792f/2667187652/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170125_pw_sg3&source=em_20170125_pw_sg3"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c703/4067b0a/23b66aebc/7e7b792c/2667187652/VEsB/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170125_pw_sg3&source=em_20170125_pw_sg3") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c703/4067b0a/23b66aebc/7e7b792d/2667187652/VEsO/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170125_pw_sg3&source=em_20170125_pw_sg3"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: We need to protect the right to vote Add your name if you're ready to fight to protect the right to vote: "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utmcampaign=em20170125pwsg3&source=em20170125pwsg3") I'm doing my best not to react to every little thing Donald Trump tweets. But his tweets this morning -- announcing a "major investigation" into supposed voter fraud based on his absurd belief that he lost the popular vote because as many as 5 million people illegally voted in November -- are a real cause for alarm. "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=2+-+This+is+a+call+to+action+for+all+of+us+w&utmcampaign=em20170125pwsg3&source=em20170125pwsg3") Because if Trump were serious about this investigation, he'd just turn up what we already know -- real, in-person voter fraud is virtually non-existent. You're more likely to get struck by lightning than find someone who illegally cast a ballot. "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=3+-+But+this+isnt+a+legitimate+investigation&utmcampaign=em20170125pwsg3&source=em20170125pwsg3") In the years since the Supreme Court gutted the Voting Rights Act, as Republicans have won governorships and gained power in state legislatures, they've put in place restrictions that make it harder to vote -- eliminating same-day registration, strict voter ID laws, drastic cuts to voting hours and locations, and the like. We already suspected that Trump was going to try and do the same thing on a national level. Immediately after Election Day, he was taking advice from Kansas Secretary of State Kris Kobach, the architect of several states' harsh voting restrictions. His choice of Attorney General, Jeff Sessions, has bought into Trump's illegal voting conspiracy and is a long-time opponent of the Voting Rights Act. And now this. It's no coincidence that a week after John Lewis called Donald Trump illegitimate, after the lowest approval ratings for a newly-inaugurated president in recent memory, after millions marched around the world to protest his regressive agenda, Trump has resurrected unfounded claims of voter fraud as justification for suppressing the vote. The right to vote is the most important right in our democracy -- it is how we defend all other rights and how we hold our elected officials accountable. And Donald Trump is coming for it. So we need to be more resolved than ever to defend our access to the ballot box. Democrats are ready to go to the mat to protect the right to vote. If you're with us, add your name right now: "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=4+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utmcampaign=em20170125pwsg3&source=em20170125pwsg3") Thanks, Pratt Pratt Wiley Director of Voter Expansion Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Team Cooper
subject: Are you ready?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Roy needs you to stand with him in defending the priorities we fought for during a long and difficult election.
We must keep the pressure on them. We must hold them accountable. Sign the petition now.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12028d7/2fde7c66/43907d3c/15691e13/1106113383/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/are-you-ready-add-your-name?utm_campaign=em17_170125_ncga_adv_gq_ful_tc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170125_ncga_adv_gq_ful_tc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friends, Are you ready? Today is the first day of the 2017 session in the North Carolina Legislature -- and Governor Cooper is ready to roll up his sleeves. During the session, Governor Cooper will work hard to find consensus with legislative leaders. But when they disagree, Roy will fight for what he believes in. And he needs you to stand with him in defending the priorities we fought for during a long and difficult election. **Add your name today to let Roy know you 're ready for the road ahead: ** | | [**Yes, I 've got Roy's back ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12028d7/2fde7c66/43907d3c/15691e13/1106113383/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/are-you-ready-add-your-name?utm_campaign=em17_170125_ncga_adv_gq_ful_tc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170125_ncga_adv_gq_ful_tc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
It's time to repeal HB2 -- it has cost our economy thousands of jobs and hundreds of millions of dollars and wrote discrimination into law.
Expanding Medicaid would insure hundreds of thousands of North Carolinians and would bring tens of thousands of jobs to our state.
And we must band together to make sure that communities torn apart by Hurricane Matthew have the resources and help they need to rebuild.
Governor Cooper knows that there is more that unites us than divides us as North Carolinians, and he's excited about the possibilities. But to defend our common ground, we need to stay engaged in the months ahead.
**[Add your name to let Roy know you have his back.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12028d7/2fde7c66/43907d3c/15691e13/1106113383/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/are-you-ready-add-your-name?utm_campaign=em17_170125_ncga_adv_gq_ful_tc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170125_ncga_adv_gq_ful_tc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
Thanks for your continued support,
Team Cooper

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 10587
Raleigh NC 27605 United States

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12028d7/2fde7c66/43907d3c/15691e12/1106113383/VEsC/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe")

name: signature-needed@dscc.org
subject: PETITION: Stop President Trump's lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
President Trump's takeover of Washington is already threatening the norms of our democracy. We need grassroots Democrats to fight back NOW! [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eda8/2b07114c/477ef336/7369feae/2134225075/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-lies?source=PT-20170125-Signature_DS-ProsHV")
---
Friend -- **President Trump is abusing his power to silence the truth and spread lies. **

His first days in Washington are telling. First, Trump's administration pettily disputed inauguration crowd size with "_alternative facts_ ," then, he had the audacity to call together lawmakers and falsely declare that millions voted illegally to rob him of the popular vote.

**But it gets worse. Yesterday, Trump ordered media blackouts so the USDA and Environmental Protection Agency cannot talk to the public about climate change. **

**[We cannot let Trump's stranglehold on information continue, Friend. Will you pledge to hold President Trump accountable? Add your name >>](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eda8/2b07114c/477ef336/7369feae/2134225075/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-lies?source=PT-20170125-Signature_DS-ProsHV")**

_**Your Action History:**_
**Name:** Friend
****Last Petition Signed** : **N/A
**Stand Up to President Trump 's Lies: **[**signature needed >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eda8/2b07114c/477ef336/7369feae/2134225075/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-lies?source=PT-20170125-Signature_DS-ProsHV")

Stopping Trump's alternate reality from gaining traction will only stop if we push back against it.

That means standing with Democrats calling out these falsehoods, **like Senator Bernie Sanders who said Trump 's baseless comments are "sending a message to every Republican governor in this country to go forward with voter suppression."**

[**Friend, we can 't wait another minute to stand up for the truth. Add your name and pledge today to hold President Trump accountable >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eda8/2b07114c/477ef336/7369feae/2134225075/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-lies?source=PT-20170125-Signature_DS-ProsHV")

Thanks,
Team DSCC

****A quick note on donations, Friend:****

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[****Contribute****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20170125-Signature_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eda8/2b07114c/477ef336/7369fea8/2134225075/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eda8/2b07114c/477ef336/7369feab/2134225075/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eda8/2b07114c/477ef336/7369feaa/2134225075/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: gag order
body:
The Trump administration needs to be held accountable
---
**Republicans in Congress are not holding Trump's administration accountable -- so we have to. Pitch in $3 today:

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c701/4067b0a/23b2ac20f/7e7b62da/523024494/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170125_ew2_nd&source=em_20170125_ew2_nd")**
Friend --

_"Because today we are not merely transferring power from one administration to another, or from one party to another -- but we are transferring power from Washington, D.C. and giving it back to you, the American People."_

That's what Donald Trump said in his inaugural speech just a mere five days ago -- and then the crackdown started.

One of the Trump administration's first actions was to ban federal agencies from tweeting (after the National Park Service tweeted a photo of the small inauguration crowd on the National Mall -- whoops!). But then they took it a step further.

Several federal agencies were put under a gag order, prohibiting employees from communicating with the press or giving out any information to the public about what was happening at the agency. The Department of Agriculture was told to stop publishing scientific research. The EPA has been ordered to purge any references to climate change from its website -- expect that to come down later today.

I'm confused... if we are supposedly putting the government back into the hands of the people, why is this administration prohibiting federal agencies from even talking to the public about what they're doing? Why is Trump making it harder for the media to report on the actions of the federal government?

The answer is that, as we know, Donald doesn't mean anything that he says. He's not giving the government back to the people -- he's holding it hostage to the whims of his own fact-free reality. And it's apparent that Republicans in Congress don't care and aren't going to hold him accountable. So if they won't, we will.

Will you pitch in $3 now so that we can continue to stand up to this administration and the GOP?

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c701/4067b0a/23b2ac20f/7e7b62db/523024494/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170125_ew2_nd&source=em_20170125_ew2_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c701/4067b0a/23b2ac20f/7e7b62d8/523024494/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170125_ew2_nd&source=em_20170125_ew2_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c701/4067b0a/23b2ac20f/7e7b62d9/523024494/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170125_ew2_nd&source=em_20170125_ew2_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c701/4067b0a/23b2ac20f/7e7b62e6/523024494/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170125_ew2_nd&source=em_20170125_ew2_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c701/4067b0a/23b2ac20f/7e7b62e7/523024494/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170125_ew2_nd&source=em_20170125_ew2_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c701/4067b0a/23b2ac20f/7e7b62e4/523024494/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170125_ew2_nd&source=em_20170125_ew2_nd")
** Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c701/4067b0a/23b2ac20f/7e7b62e5/523024494/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170125_ew2_nd&source=em_20170125_ew2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c701/4067b0a/23b2ac20f/7e7b62e2/523024494/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170125_ew2_nd&source=em_20170125_ew2_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c701/4067b0a/23b2ac20f/7e7b62e3/523024494/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170125_ew2_nd&source=em_20170125_ew2_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c701/4067b0a/23b2ac20f/7e7b62e0/523024494/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170125_ew2_nd&source=em_20170125_ew2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: EMILY's List
subject: Women's March: Share your story!
body:

# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|
---
